scenarios.title: Health gate rejects a stopped postgres service

gherkin.given: The disposable test stack has a core health endpoint that is reachable or degraded and postgres is stopped, unhealthy, or unable to complete SELECT 1
gherkin.when: The E2E readiness gate is invoked
gherkin.then: The gate fails with a postgres readiness error and no persistence test continues as if the stack were healthy

linkedTests.testId: Adversarial Regression E2E: stopped postgres cannot pass readiness

scenarios.title: Clean initdb does not produce a false ready signal

gherkin.given: The disposable test postgres volume has been removed
gherkin.when: The test stack starts from a clean initdb state
gherkin.then: Startup and E2E readiness wait until PostgreSQL can complete a real psql SELECT 1 round trip

linkedTests.testId: Regression E2E: clean initdb transition waits for real DB readiness

scenarios.title: Persistence survives restart after the readiness gate

gherkin.given: SCN-002-004 inserts a uniquely identifiable artifact into PostgreSQL
gherkin.when: The test stack is stopped without removing the postgres test volume and then started again
gherkin.then: The artifact is still present after restart and the scenario reports count 1

scenarios.title: Canonical E2E reaches Go block after lifecycle scenarios

gherkin.given: The canonical E2E suite is running through ./smackerel.sh test e2e
gherkin.then: The suite is not aborted by service postgres is not running and the Go E2E block is eligible to run

linkedTests.testId: Go E2E block executes after lifecycle shell tests
Broader E2E regression suite reaches Go block
